headline: This $2 Million Portfolio Pays a Six-Figure Income Without Owning a Single Rental Property
summary: A $2 million investment portfolio can generate a six-figure income stream without tenants, maintenance calls, property tax surprises, or vacancy risk. The arithmetic is straightforward. The challenge is deciding how much yield to pursue and understanding the trade-offs that come with it. To make a fair comparison, start with rental real estate. Many landlords aim ...
